title: A/B Testing for Model Version Evaluation
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of showing Version B of a model to a specific user group (Group 1) as part of an A/B testing framework for comparing model performance.
relationships: The User Population is randomly split by the Traffic Split mechanism
Group 1 is directed to interact with Model Version B
User interactions from Group 1 are recorded by the Metric Tracking System for analysis against a control group
